3155010.name: Necrosis: Dawn of Dread
3155010.description:
What is Necrosis: Dawn of Dread?



Necrosis: Dawn of Dread is a tense, brutal, and unforgiving first-person shooter co-op survival horror experience that blends the claustrophobic dread of old-school 90's era survival horror games with modern gameplay mechanics. Team up with up to three friends in online multiplayer to scavenge supplies, survive relentless combat encounters, and solve challenging puzzles in one of 15 unique missions overwhelmed by the undead. Every mission is a desperate fight to survive with hardcore character interdependence, inventory management, and finely tuned pacing.

Key Features

Terrifying Co-op Survival Horror

Experience classic survival horror from a new angle. NDOD drops you into large, unpredictable environments filled with relentless enemies, dwindling resources, and no guarantees.

Tactical FPS Combat

Manage limited ammo, choose your shots carefully, and master a variety of weapons. NDOD rewards precision and teamwork. Reckless shooting will only get you killed. Unlike arcade-style zombie shooters, NDOD doesn’t hand you infinite ammo and disposable enemies. Necrosis is survival horror. Precise, punishing, and built around dread.

Engaging Puzzles

Solve layered, interactive puzzles that challenge your observation and deduction skills. These are designed to keep you thinking and actively involved in every mission.

Twelve Unique Survivors + Many Unlockable Characters

Choose your squad from a roster of twelve distinct survivors, each with a unique role and special ability. Melee takedowns, crowd control, healing, enemy debuffs, stuns, team buffs, starting gear, and more. Every character has a unique weapon. Mix and match characters to find the ideal team synergy. Unlock additional secret characters as you progress, each bringing new tactics and surprises to your survival toolkit.

Large Replayable Levels

With fifteen unique environments inspired by survival horror classics, NDOD is built to be played again and again. Each map is packed with atmosphere, danger, and secrets waiting to be discovered. In some missions, you’ll even rely on cars or motorcycles in desperate bids for survival.

Randomized Encounters

No two sessions are the same. Enemy placements, item locations, and some puzzles change each time you play. The experience stays fresh no matter how often you return.

Built for Replayability

Session-based design means you can drop in for a quick run or settle in for a night of survival. Perfect for both casual and hardcore co-op players.

Additional Features

  • Automatcher Queue – Match with other survivors and use proximity VOIP or text chat to coordinate your escape.

  • Single Player Mode – Play solo if you prefer, but NDOD is best experienced in co-op.

  • Four Difficulty Settings - Choose your ideal level of challenge.

  • Achievements & Unlockables – No microtransactions. Unlock cosmetics and rewards through gameplay, not payments.

  • Leaderboards – Compete for the fastest clears and prove your survival skills.

  • Long-Term Roadmap – Additional levels, characters, and enemies planned post-launch: All free.

  • No DRM. No Third-Party Accounts. – Just buy the game and play. No logins, no restrictions.

Built with Respect for Players

Necrosis: Dawn of Dread is developed independently with a focus on player-first design. No microtransactions. No always-online requirement. No corporate interference. Just uncompromising co-op survival horror built for fans of the genre.

*具有完全音频支持的语言
